[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101 3
1 1001100 3
2 0101001 3
3 1101110 5
4 0011010 3
5 0010010 2
6 0011010 3
7 1100111 5

01 10 0011010 3 match 4 6
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1100111 5 match 7
34 43 1101101 5
45 54 1101101 5
56 65 1101111 6
67 76 1111110 6
70 07 0011010 3 match 4 6

71 17 0011010 3 match 4 6
